objective: Make the Experiments surface higher-functionality by letting a saved browser-local experiment decision create a cautious Today plan, while preserving the truth boundary that no backend, medical automation, reminders, WHOOP, accounts, AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, or cross-device sync is connected.
riskClass: Q3 because this checkpoint is intended for Git push and Vercel production deployment under prior explicit production approval; no credentials, auth settings, DNS, backend services, or destructive service state are changed.
approvalStatus: Production promotion was explicitly approved earlier in this goal thread with PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote. This report covers browser-local demo behavior only.
changedBehavior: A saved local experiment decision now exposes a real Use decision in Today plan control.
The handoff replaces the browser-local Today plan, clears stale focus session state, resets plan item statuses to open, and adds a local memory candidate explaining the plan source.
Generated plan copy is compact enough for mobile inputs after visual repair.
The result panel copy explicitly says the handoff is local, cautious, and not automatic routine change.
Next build workers are capped at one in next.config.ts to avoid local EAGAIN worker-spawn failures on this process-constrained machine.
functionalFlowsProvenLocally: Reset local demo data from Profile.
Saved one Capture event for protected first block.
Started a local experiment from the unlocked Experiments builder.
Saved a Keep experiment decision with a decision note.
Clicked Use decision in Today plan and saw a visible success status.
Navigated to Today and verified plan fields changed to the experiment-derived plan.
Reloaded Today and verified the plan persisted.
Opened Privacy and verified the WHOOP/backend boundary copy remained reachable.
Checked mobile viewport width and scroll width at 390px; no horizontal overflow.
Checked browser console errors in the in-app browser; none were reported.

verifiedPlanAfterReload.must_do: Repeat kept part: protect first useful block
verifiedPlanAfterReload.optional_2: Close the loop without adding another rule
verifiedPlanAfterReload.avoid_today: Do not scale beyond one block

loopEvidence.defectOrRisk: An experiment decision could remain passive proof rather than changing any visible daily workflow.
loopEvidence.repair: Added createPlanFromExperimentDecision and wired the Experiment result panel to create a browser-local Today plan.

loopEvidence.defectOrRisk: Next build failed after compile/typecheck because it tried to spawn 11 page-data workers and hit EAGAIN.
loopEvidence.repair: Set next.config.ts experimental.cpus to 1 and reran build successfully with one worker.

loopEvidence.defectOrRisk: Standalone headless Playwright mobile test failed twice before app interaction because Chromium launch timed out.
loopEvidence.repair: Changed strategy to the in-app browser after repeated identical launch failure and completed the focused mobile flow there.

loopEvidence.defectOrRisk: The first generated must-do value clipped inside the mobile input.
loopEvidence.repair: Compacted the generated intervention label to Repeat kept part: protect first useful block and reran checks/proof.

loopEvidence.defectOrRisk: The first avoid_today value also clipped in the mobile input.
loopEvidence.repair: Shortened the boundary to Do not scale beyond one block and reran checks/proof.

verification.result: pass after worker cap; static routes include /, /today, /capture, /patterns, /experiments, /profile, and /privacy
blocked: browserType.launch timed out twice before app interaction; recorded as an environment/tooling blocker, not app proof
pass: experiment handoff changed Today plan, persisted after reload, opened Privacy, no console errors, no 390px horizontal overflow

residualRisks: This proves browser-local demo behavior only.
The LifeMax lab/control-plane preflight and boot packet remain red, so full LifeMax daily shared-context usability is not complete.
Standalone headless Playwright mobile screenshots remain blocked by local Chromium launch timeout; in-app browser proof is the current visible fallback.
Vercel install reported 2 moderate npm audit vulnerabilities; no dependency upgrades were performed in this slice.
No backend, account, WHOOP, AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, reminder, timer, or cross-device sync behavior is proven.
completionDecision: checkpoint, not complete: experiment-to-plan behavior is proven locally, production-smoked on both aliases, and independently verified as CHECKPOINT_OK; full LifeMax shared-context readiness remains false and COMPLETE_OK is rejected.

verifiedEvidence: Repo clean and synced with origin/main at proof audit time; feature commit b7c94b2 and proof commit 89f6173 were present.
Verifier inspected code paths for deterministic plan generation and UI handoff wiring.
Verifier confirmed test coverage for derived plan values and mobile flow assertions.
Verifier reran npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npm test with 18 passing tests.
Verifier confirmed deployed aliases returned HTTP 200 and screenshot evidence supports mobile copy fit.
